overall.description: Nighttime navigation from the bridge of a vessel, featuring operational radar, GPS chart plotter, and depth sounder displays. The vessel cruises through dark coastal waters until a large wave briefly splashes over the bow window. Game engine footage from a maritime simulation.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with electronic displays

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel's navigation systems while cruising steadily through coastal waters at night

entered.detail: colorful navigation chart showing coastline and water depth contours
circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm and range rings
blue profile display showing water column and seabed depth
forward deck of the vessel with red navigation lights visible
metal safety railing along the forward edge of the deck

segments.scene_description: The vessel maintains steady forward motion through dark waters at night. The bridge is illuminated by the glow of three navigation displays showing GPS charts, rotating radar, and depth sounding. The bow deck is visible ahead with red navigation lights glowing against the black water.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station with electronic displays

events.description: large wave crashes over the bow window completely obscuring the forward view with splashing water

agents.ego_description: maintaining course as the vessel encounters rough water and a wave impacts the bow

segments.scene_description: A large wave suddenly crashes over the bow, sending water splashing across the bridge windows and temporarily blocking all forward visibility. The water sheeting down the glass clears within moments, restoring the view of the bow deck and dark waters ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward motion through a dark maritime environment that is briefly interrupted by a sudden surge of seawater. It begins on the vessel's bridge, where the interior is bathed in the glow of GPS charts, rotating radar, and depth sounding displays while red navigation lights illuminate the bow deck against the black water. As the ship maintains its steady course, a large wave suddenly crashes over the bow, sending a wall of water splashing across the bridge windows and temporarily obscuring all forward visibility. The scene then shifts as the water sheets down the glass, gradually clearing the view to restore the sight of the bow deck and the dark, open waters ahead.
